label: Cognitive Score
description: Psychometric assessment of cognition - primary clinical endpoint

label: Synapse Density
description: Synapse density in cortex/hippocampus - strongest correlate of cognition

label: sPDGFRβ (Pericyte Injury)
description: Soluble PDGFRβ released from injured pericytes - earliest known AD biomarker

label: p-tau217
description: Plasma phospho-tau at threonine 217 - most accurate blood tau marker for population screening

label: p-tau181
description: Plasma phospho-tau at threonine 181 - FDA-cleared blood tau marker

label: Aβ42/40 Ratio
description: Plasma Aβ42/40 ratio - correlates with amyloid PET status

label: Neurofilament Light (NfL)
description: Plasma neurofilament light chain - marker of axonal injury

label: Retinal Nerve Fiber Layer
description: RNFL thickness measured by OCT - non-invasive neurodegeneration marker

label: Retinal Aβ Deposits
description: Curcumin-labeled amyloid deposits in retina - experimental screening tool

label: AD Autoantibody Panel
description: 7-autoantibody panel for AD detection; may precede pTau217 elevations

label: AMPK Phosphorylated (Inhibited)
description: pSer345 by mTORC1 prevents lysosomal recruitment

label: Lysosomal Genes Downregulated
description: TFEB targets: ATP6V0A1, ATP6V1H, CTSD, CTSB, LAMP1, LAMP2, GBA

label: Mitophagy Rate Reduced
description: AMPK/ULK1 pathway impaired; PINK1/Parkin still functional

label: S6K1 Active
description: p70 S6 kinase; phosphorylated at Thr389 by mTORC1

label: IRS-1 Serine Phosphorylated
description: pS307, pS312, pS527, pS616, pS636/639 = inhibitory

label: Lysosome Pool
description: Functional lysosome organelle pool; depleted by reduced biogenesis

label: Cargo Accumulation
description: Aβ, tau, lipids, iron, undegraded organelles

label: BMP (Bis(monoacylglycero)phosphate)
description: Lysosome-specific lipid; biomarker for lysosomal stress/storage disorders

label: Cytosolic Cathepsin B
description: Active cathepsin B escaped from lysosome

label: Undegraded mtDNA (Lysosomal)
description: DNase II inactive at high pH; mtDNA persists

label: mtDNA Escaped from Lysosome
description: mtDNA escaped through compromised membrane; DAMP

label: mPTP Open
description: Mitochondrial permeability transition pore open state

label: VDAC Oligomers
description: VDAC oligomers forming pores in outer membrane

label: Cytosolic Oxidized mtDNA
description: 500-650 bp oxidized mtDNA fragments in cytosol (FEN1-cleaved)

label: cGAS Active
description: Activated cGAS bound to cytosolic DNA

label: Aβ Oligomers
description: Soluble Aβ oligomers - most synaptotoxic species

label: C1q
description: Complement component; required for A1 induction and synapse tagging

label: A1 Toxic Lipid Secretion
description: Long-chain saturated lipids secreted by A1 astrocytes that kill neurons and OLs

label: mTOR-HIF1α Axis
description: mTOR-HIF1α signaling axis drives glycolytic shift in AD microglia

label: IRG1/Itaconate Shunt
description: IRG1 (ACOD1) diverts aconitate from TCA cycle to produce itaconate

label: TCA Cycle Disrupted
description: Broken TCA cycle forces compensatory pathways

label: Compensatory Glutaminolysis
description: Increased glutamine catabolism to feed broken TCA cycle

label: LDAM Super-seeders
description: PARADIGM SHIFT: Iron-loaded, lipid-laden microglia with dysfunctional lysosomes that SEED amyloid plaques

label: APP β-CTF (C99)
description: β-secretase cleavage product; membrane-bound C-terminal fragment

label: Aβ Monomers
description: Soluble monomeric Aβ peptides (Aβ40, Aβ42, Aβ43)

label: Aβ Production Rate
description: Aβ generation rate; Aβ42 > Aβ40 in aggregation

label: Dense-Core Plaque
description: Successfully compacted plaque with microglial barrier - PROTECTIVE

label: Diffuse Filamentous Plaque
description: Uncompacted plaque with failed microglial barrier - MORE toxic

label: Plaque-Associated Microglia
description: Microglia forming protective barrier around plaques

label: Synaptic Aβ Binding
description: Oligomer binding to PrPc, mGluR5, NMDAR

label: LTP Inhibition
description: Long-term potentiation blocked by Aβ oligomers

label: Neuronal Hyperactivity
description: Increased neuronal firing rate; UPSTREAM trigger for tau pathology

label: Tau Somatodendritic Missorting
description: Tau redistributes from axonal to somatodendritic compartment; precedes hyperphosphorylation

label: Anti-IgLON5 Autoantibodies
description: Autoantibodies against IgLON5 neuronal adhesion molecule; causes autoimmune tauopathy

label: Tau Misfolded
description: Conformationally altered tau exposing aggregation-prone regions

label: Neuronal Dysfunction
description: Impaired neuronal function due to tau/Aβ pathology

label: PP2A Inhibited
description: Major tau phosphatase; >70% of tau dephosphorylation

label: Aggregation Cofactors
description: Polyanions (HSPGs, RNA, nucleic acids) required for tau and Aβ aggregation

label: Permissive Environment
description: Cellular dysfunction creates conditions allowing aggregation

label: Secondary Nucleation
description: Fibril surfaces catalyze new aggregate formation (dominant mechanism)

label: Homocysteine
description: From methionine metabolism; elevated in AD risk

label: C3 Opsonization
description: C3 cleavage → C3b deposits on tagged synapses

label: Synaptic Plasticity
description: Capacity for LTP/LTD and dendritic spine remodeling; correlates with learning/memory

label: BDNF
description: Brain-derived neurotrophic factor; master regulator of synaptic plasticity

label: Dendritic Spine Density
description: Number of dendritic spines per unit dendrite length; structural basis of plasticity

label: Ferroportin Reduced
description: Iron export blocked → intracellular iron trap

label: Lysosomal Iron Trap
description: Iron in lysosomes (pH too high for release)

label: Labile Iron Pool
description: Cytosolic free Fe²⁺ available for Fenton chemistry

label: Functional Iron Deficiency
description: Cytosolic Fe²⁺ depleted despite total iron↑

label: Microglial Senescence
description: Senescent microglia - paradoxically associated with LARGER brain volume

label: Excitatory Neuron Senescence
description: Senescent excitatory neurons - associated with brain VOLUME LOSS

label: CREB5 Expression
description: Transcription factor reduced in AD - regulates oxidative stress

label: Senescence-Driven Volume Loss
description: Brain volume reduction from excitatory neuron senescence

label: REST Nuclear (Protective)
description: REST increases in healthy aging but DECREASES in AD

label: REST Depleted (AD)
description: Nuclear REST lost in AD neurons

label: Myelin Sulfatides
description: Sulfated galactosylceramides in myelin (~5% of myelin lipids)

label: ApoE4 Sulfatide Transport (Enhanced)
description: ApoE4 > E3 > E2 sulfatide transport efficiency

label: Sulfatide Depletion
description: Pathological sulfatide loss (occurs at MCI stage)

label: Myelin Integrity
description: Normal myelin sheath structure and function

label: Myelin Dysfunction
description: Myelin sheath instability from sulfatide depletion

label: Plasma OMG
description: Blood OMG level - oligodendrocyte function marker

label: CSF Sulfatide
description: CSF sulfatide/PI ratio - early AD biomarker

label: DAM Transition Blocked
description: TREM2-/- or variant: Stage 1 → Stage 2 blocked

label: Pericyte Injury
description: sPDGFRβ in CSF = pericyte injury biomarker - EARLIEST detectable AD pathology

label: LRP1-ApoE4 Impairment
description: ApoE4 impairs LRP1-mediated Aβ clearance at BBB

label: Meningeal Lymphatics
description: CNS lymphatic drainage; declines with aging

label: BBB Integrity
description: Blood-brain barrier structural and functional integrity

label: Pericyte Function
description: Pericyte-mediated BBB support and capillary dilation

label: AQP4 Polarization
description: AQP4 concentrated at astrocyte endfeet (healthy state)

label: Arterial Pulsatility
description: Vasomotion amplitude that drives perivascular CSF flow

label: CSF-ISF Exchange
description: Bidirectional fluid exchange in brain parenchyma

label: Astrocyte Endfeet Integrity
description: Structural integrity of astrocyte endfeet ensheathing blood vessels

label: FcRn Transport (BBB)
description: Neonatal Fc receptor-mediated antibody transcytosis across BBB

label: FcRn Recycling (Periphery)
description: FcRn salvage pathway extends IgG half-life in blood

label: Peripheral Sink Hypothesis
description: Theory that peripheral Aβ removal shifts brain→blood equilibrium

label: Intramural Periarterial Drainage (IPAD)
description: Aβ drains along basement membranes of cerebral arteries

label: Cervical Lymph Node Drainage
description: CNS antigens drain to deep cervical lymph nodes

label: Splenic Aβ Clearance
description: Spleen filters Aβ-antibody immune complexes from blood

label: Hepatic Aβ Clearance
description: Liver Kupffer cells clear Aβ from blood

label: Oligodendrocyte Precursor Cells
description: NG2+ progenitors; maintain remyelination capacity; support BBB

label: Mature Oligodendrocytes
description: MBP+/MOG+ myelinating cells; vulnerable to APOE4, A1 astrocytes

label: OPC NOS1 Activity
description: Nitric oxide synthase 1 expression in OPCs - HUMAN-SPECIFIC

label: OPC-Derived TGF-β1
description: TGF-β1 secreted by OPCs to support BBB integrity

label: OPC-Vascular Coupling
description: OPC Ca²⁺ signaling drives neurovascular coupling

label: Remyelination Capacity
description: Ability to regenerate myelin after damage

label: Neuronal SLIT2
description: SLIT2 secreted by excitatory neurons; upregulated in tauopathy

label: OL Fyn Kinase Activity
description: Fyn kinase activity in oligodendrocytes; normally promotes OL maturation

label: OL RhoA-GTP
description: Active RhoA (GTP-bound) in oligodendrocytes; drives cytoskeletal contraction

label: OL Process Retraction
description: Oligodendrocyte process retraction from axons; primary mechanism of Class B AD demyelination

label: Myelin Sheath Withdrawal
description: Active myelin sheath withdrawal/retraction (distinct from degradation)

label: DAP12 Signaling
description: DAP12/TYROBP signaling in microglia; triggers SLIT2 induction in neurons

label: α7 Nicotinic AChR
description: Nicotinic acetylcholine receptor with ultra-high affinity for Aβ42

label: Aβ42–α7nAChR Complex
description: Pathogenic complex that triggers tau phosphorylation and intraneuronal Aβ

label: Microtubule Destabilization
description: Hyperphosphorylated tau can no longer stabilize microtubules

label: OL Iron Content
description: Oligodendrocytes contain MORE iron than any other brain cell type

label: ER Ca²⁺ Stores
description: PS1 mutations → ER Ca²⁺ leak dysfunction

label: Target Engagement
description: Drug binds target with sufficient occupancy

label: X-Linked Lysosomal Genes
description: ATP6AP2, SLC9A7, ATP6AP1, LAMP2 on X chromosome

label: Female Iron Storage Failure
description: Women with AD show opposite iron-ferritin correlation

label: Microglial Reprogramming
description: Long-lived microglia as trained immunity substrates

label: IFN-γ
description: Interferon gamma; key trained immunity effector

label: GFAP (Released)
description: GFAP released from damaged astrocytes into CSF/plasma

label: PVS Enlarged
description: Enlarged perivascular spaces (MRI-visible) - early structural marker

label: GLT-1/EAAT2 (SLC1A2)
description: Primary glutamate transporter responsible for 90% of synaptic glutamate clearance

label: GLT-1 Downregulated
description: Reduced astrocytic glutamate clearance capacity in AD/GWI

label: Extracellular Glutamate ↑
description: Elevated synaptic/extrasynaptic glutamate due to impaired clearance

label: Glutamate Excitotoxicity
description: Neuronal damage from excessive glutamate receptor activation

label: Low-Glutamate Diet
description: Dietary intervention reducing free glutamate intake

label: Glutamine Synthetase (Reduced)
description: Reduced GS activity in AD astrocytes

label: Plasma GFAP
description: Blood GFAP level - astrocyte damage marker

label: Pathogenic Exposure
description: Viral or bacterial infection triggering post-infectious syndrome

label: Neurotoxicant Exposure
description: Environmental neurotoxicants as AD risk factors (GWI model)

label: GWI Glymphatic Impairment
description: Measured glymphatic dysfunction in Gulf War veterans (Zhang 2026)

label: Chronic Immune Activation
description: Persistent immune dysregulation following infection (Long COVID/ME/CFS state)

label: GPCR Autoantibodies
description: Autoantibodies against G-protein coupled receptors (β-adrenergic, muscarinic, AT1, ETA)

label: Plasma GPCR-AABs
description: Measurable autoantibodies against GPCRs in plasma

label: GPCR Signaling Dysregulated
description: Dysfunctional GPCR signaling due to autoantibody binding

label: Vasoregulatory Dysfunction
description: Impaired blood vessel regulation from GPCR-AAB effects

label: Microcirculatory Impairment
description: Small vessel dysfunction leading to tissue hypoperfusion

label: Tissue Hypoperfusion
description: Reduced blood flow to tissues including brain

label: Trained Immunity (Protective)
description: Beneficial epigenetic reprogramming of innate immunity from vaccination

label: Trained Immunity (Maladaptive)
description: Harmful epigenetic reprogramming from infection leading to chronic inflammation

label: IRG1/Itaconate Shunt
description: Metabolic switch producing itaconate from aconitate

label: GABA Shunt Active
description: Alternative glutamate metabolism pathway active during immune activation

label: Neurofilament Light (NfL)
description: Marker of axonal damage elevated in post-infectious neurodegeneration

label: Estrogen Level
description: Circulating estrogen (E2) - declines sharply at menopause

label: Testosterone Level
description: Circulating testosterone - gradual decline with age in men

label: Cortisol Level
description: Circulating cortisol - elevated in chronic stress and AD

label: Stress Reduction Interventions
description: Mindfulness, meditation, social support, lifestyle interventions

label: Melatonin Level
description: Pineal melatonin production - declines with age
